title: Email Client — Requirements Discovery
description: You asked the agent to build an email client. Before drafting a spec, it needs to understand who this is for, which features matter, and what trade-offs you're willing to make. Answer below and the agent will produce a functional spec from your responses.

options: Individual power user (heavy keyboard, many accounts)

questions.text: Which platforms must this ship on at v1?
Which email providers must be supported out of the box?
Which features are NON-NEGOTIABLE at v1?
How aggressive should the AI features be?
Which existing client is the closest visual/UX reference?

options: Local-only (no cloud sync of message bodies)
Standard cloud (provider IMAP, our metadata only)

questions.text: Must the app work fully offline?
How many users do you expect at launch and at 12 months?
questions.hint: Rough orders of magnitude are fine (e.g. '100 beta, 10k by Q4').

questions.text: Is there a hard launch date?
Any budget / team-size constraints the agent should know about?
questions.hint: e.g. 'solo founder, 6 month runway', 'team of 4 engineers, can ship paid services'.

questions.text: What is explicitly OUT of scope for v1?
questions.hint: List anything you want the agent to NOT build.

questions.text: What worries you most about this project?
